---
title: "dyad_analysis"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("analysis", "dataload.R"))
source(file.path("analysis", "analysis_helpers.R"))

```

```{r}
dy <- load_dyad_conditions(outputs_dir = "final_outputs")
dyad_df <- dy$conditions
dyad_sweep_dir <- dy$sweep_dir

print_basic_checks(dyad_df, keys = c("k", "delta_omega"))

dyad_df %>% summarise(across(c(r_mean, plv_mean, anti_mean), ~sum(is.na(.x))))

```

```{r}
# --- dyad printed summaries ---
dyad_best_antiphase <- dyad_df %>%
  arrange(desc(anti_mean), desc(plv_mean)) %>%
  slice(1)

dyad_best_plv <- dyad_df %>%
  arrange(desc(plv_mean), desc(r_mean)) %>%
  slice(1)

dyad_worst_plv <- dyad_df %>%
  arrange(plv_mean, r_mean) %>%
  slice(1)

dyad_top5_antiphase <- dyad_df %>%
  arrange(desc(anti_mean)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  select(k, delta_omega, anti_mean, plv_mean, r_mean)

list(
  best_antiphase = dyad_best_antiphase,
  best_plv = dyad_best_plv,
  worst_plv = dyad_worst_plv,
  top5_antiphase = dyad_top5_antiphase
)

```

```{r}
dyad_df %>%
  arrange(desc(anti_mean), desc(plv_mean)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  select(k, delta_omega, anti_mean, plv_mean, r_mean) %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Top 10 dyad conditions by anti-phase score (tail-mean)")
```


```{r}
p_anti <- heatmap_tile(
  dyad_df,
  x = k, y = delta_omega, fill = anti_mean,
  title = "Dyad regime map: anti-phase score (mean over last fraction)",
  xlab = "coupling k", ylab = "frequency mismatch Δω"
)

p_plv <- heatmap_tile(
  dyad_df,
  x = k, y = delta_omega, fill = plv_mean,
  title = "Dyad regime map: PLV (mean over last fraction)",
  xlab = "coupling k", ylab = "frequency mismatch Δω"
)

p_r <- heatmap_tile(
  dyad_df,
  x = k, y = delta_omega, fill = r_mean,
  title = "Dyad regime map: global coherence R (mean over last fraction)",
  xlab = "coupling k", ylab = "frequency mismatch Δω"
)

p_anti
p_plv
p_r


```

```{r}

save_fig(p_anti, "dyad_heatmap_antiphase.png", dyad_sweep_dir)
save_fig(p_plv,  "dyad_heatmap_plv.png",      dyad_sweep_dir)
save_fig(p_r,    "dyad_heatmap_r.png",        dyad_sweep_dir)
```
